calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Off Calendar

Prove-Up
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Annabel Chang, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CLAIRE A. SPENCER, AS TRUSTEE OF THE WILLIAM D. SPENCER AND CLAIRE A. SPENCER 1195 LIVING TRUST ("SPENCER") AND CLAIRE A. SPENCER AS THE SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO WILLIAM SPENCER DBA WILLIAM SPENCER COMPANY ("WSC").
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SEAN ANTHONY ALFONSO, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA J&S RECYCLING; J&S RECYCLING LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $412,520.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $37,814.00
Attorney's Fees: $67,430.00
Costs: $3,396.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $521,160.00
Judgment signed in open court.
